mapper.select: /* oms-master-owner-sql-oracle.xml selectOwnerList */ SELECT OWKEY , OWNM , REGNO , BIZTYPE , BIZCTG , CITY , STATE , TEL1 , TEL2 , FAX , CONTACT , CEO , CNTRYCD , ADDR1 , ADDR2 , ZIPCD , DELYN , CLOSDATE , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY FROM TORDER_MST_OW WHERE OWKEY = 'DAISO'
